## Gate checklist

- [ ] **01 Benchmark** — reference apps / behaviour patterns researched
- [ ] **02 User journey** — JD's moment, emotional state, and flow defined
- [ ] **03 Design + copy** — screen-by-screen spec written, exact copy defined
- [ ] **JD sign-off** — design approved before implementation started
- [ ] **04 Scope** — v1 boundary defined, out-of-scope list exists
- [ ] **05 Implement** — `npm run build` passes clean, screenshot proof taken
- [ ] **06 Document** — `FEATURES.md` updated, `ROADMAP.md` updated

## Schema changes
